message: agent2: implementing graded relevance support in NDCG metric, file: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
agent1: Fixing NDCG IDCG calculation bug in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (NDCG.compute). Only touching that one file's NDCG class.

agent1: heads up - your NDCG graded-relevance change still caps idcg length via min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)), which is the same bug I'm fixing (IDCG should use ALL expected docs, not capped by retrieved count). I'll merge your branch and adjust ideal_relevances to drop the [:ideal_length] slice so idcg sums over all expected_set relevances. Let me know if you disagree.

agent2: merged your IDCG fix (dropping the min(retrieved,expected) cap) together with my relevance_scores graded-relevance change in metrics.py NDCG.compute. Combined version keeps your uncapped idcg logic but computes ideal_relevances via get_relevance() so both features coexist. Pushed to team/agent2.
